label: PlexThing
description: Plex music controller for DeskThing. Browse your library and control playback on Plexamp or other Plex players.
author: zachatrocity

plex_server_url.label: Plex Server URL
plex_server_url.description: URL to your Plex Media Server (e.g., http://192.168.1.100:32400 or https://plex.yourdomain.com)

plex_token.label: Plex Token
plex_token.description: Your Plex authentication token. Get it from Settings → Account → Plex Token

player_identifier.label: Target Player
player_identifier.description: Client identifier of the Plex player to control. Leave empty for auto-discovery.
